config.script:
#include "50122" dim g_pRaportParam : set g_pRaportParam = nothing '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'sumator dla raport executor section '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- class CRESumator private m_curSum private m_strCol public sub init(byval strCol) m_strCol = strCol reset end sub public sub reset() m_curSum = ccur(0.0) end sub public sub update(byref pRec) m_curSum = m_curSum + ccur(pRec(m_strCol)) end sub public function result result = m_curSum end function public sub add(curValue) m_curSum = m_curSum + curValue end sub end class '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'sumator dla raport executor section '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- class CRECounter private m_nCount public sub reset() m_nCount = clng(0) end sub public sub update(byref pRec) m_nCount = m_nCount + 1 end sub public function result result = m_nCount end function end class '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'sekcja dla raport executor engine '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- class CRaportExecutorSection private m_WDValue 'watchdog value private m_WDFieldInx 'watchdog field private m_Counters() private m_CounterUB 'm_Counters upper bound public m_pBeginProc 'begin section procedure public m_pEndProc 'end section procedure public m_pRowProc 'row notification procedure public m_iRowNr 'section row counter public sub init(byval WDFieldInx,byref pBeginProc,byref pEndProc,byref pRowProc) m_WDValue = 0 'good for idobj m_WDFieldInx = WDFieldInx set m_pBeginProc = pBeginProc set m_pEndProc = pEndProc set m_pRowProc = pRowProc m_CounterUB = -1 end sub private sub add_counter(byref pCounter) m_CounterUB = m_CounterUB + 1 redim preserve m_Counters(m_CounterUB+1) set m_Counters(m_CounterUB) = pCounter end sub 'watchdog runtime management public function getwdfield() getwdfield = m_WDFieldInx end function public property get wdval() wdval = m_WDValue end property public property let wdval(newval) m_WDValue = newval end property 'runtime procedure forwarders public sub begin_section(byref pCurrRec) m_iRowNr = 1 'reset counters dim iter for iter = 0 to m_CounterUB m_Counters(iter).reset next if not m_pBeginProc is nothing then m_pBeginProc me, pCurrRec end if end sub public sub end_section() if not m_pEndProc is nothing then m_pEndProc me end if end sub public sub process_row(byref pCurrRec) if not m_pRowProc is nothing then m_pRowProc me,pCurrRec end if 'update counters dim iter for iter = 0 to m_CounterUB m_Counters(iter).update pCurrRec next m_iRowNr = m_iRowNr + 1 end sub public property get lp() lp = m_iRowNr end property public property get even() even = (m_iRowNr mod 2 = 0) end property '-------- counters ----------- public function add_sumator(byval strCol) dim pSumator : set pSumator = new CRESumator pSumator.init strCol add_counter pSumator set add_sumator = me end function public property get counter(byval nCounter) set counter = m_Counters(nCounter) end property end class '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'engine wykonujący raport '-------------------------------------------------------------------------- class CRaportExecutorEngine private m_Sections() private m_SectionUB 'm_Sections upper bound private m_pBodySection private m_strTitle private m_strADOQuery private m_pCurrRec private m_nRecNr 'numer aktualnego rekordu private m_nRecCount 'liczba rekordów private sub finish_section(byval nLevel) m_Sections(nLevel).end_section end sub private sub begin_section(byval nLevel) m_Sections(nLevel).begin_section m_pCurrRec end sub private sub setwd_value(byval nLevel) dim wdfield : wdfield = m_Sections(nLevel).getwdfield() if wdfield <> -1 then m_Sections(nLevel).wdval = m_pCurrRec.fields(wdfield) end if end sub private sub write_row() dim iter for iter = 0 to m_SectionUB m_Sections(iter).process_row m_pCurrRec next end sub private function isend() isend = m_pCurrRec.EOF end function private sub next_row() m_pCurrRec.MoveNext end sub private function open() : open = false 'jeśli nie był dostarczony, to otwórz if m_pCurrRec is nothing then on error resume next set m_pCurrRec = trans_.createadors(m_strADOQuery) on error goto 0 end if if m_pCurrRec is nothing then exit function end if open = not isend() if not isend() then m_nRecNr = clng(0) end if ' wyznacz liczbę wyników w raporcie m_nRecCount = m_pCurrRec.RecordCount end function private sub begin_raport_data() dim iter for iter = 0 to m_SectionUB setwd_value iter begin_section iter next end sub private sub finish_raport_data() dim iter for iter = m_SectionUB to 0 step -1 finish_section iter next end sub private sub process_row() dim iter for iter = 0 to m_SectionUB dim wdfield : wdfield = m_Sections(iter).getwdfield() if wdfield <> -1 then dim strCurrRecVal: strCurrRecVal = m_pCurrRec.fields(wdfield).value if (not isNull(strCurrRecVal)) then strCurrRecVal=cstr(strCurrRecVal) end if dim strSectionsVal: strSectionsVal=m_Sections(iter).wdval if (not isNull(strSectionsVal)) then strSectionsVal=cstr(strSectionsVal) end if if (strCurrRecVal <> strSectionsVal) then 'detected change 'finish all from iter to m_watchdogUB dim iter2 for iter2 = m_SectionUB to iter step -1 finish_section iter2 setwd_value iter2 next 'begin new sections for iter2 = iter to m_SectionUB begin_section iter2 next end if end if next write_row end sub private sub addsection(byref pNewSection) m_SectionUB = m_SectionUB + 1 redim preserve m_Sections(m_SectionUB+1) set m_Sections(m_SectionUB) = pNewSection end sub public sub Class_Initialize() m_SectionUB = -1 set m_pBodySection = nothing set m_pCurrRec = nothing end sub '-------------------- public --------------------------------- public function prepare(byval strTitle,byref pDefaultParamArray,byref pCallParamArray,byval strSQLQuery) merge_params pDefaultParamArray,pCallParamArray m_strTitle = strTitle if show_raport_param_dialog(pDefaultParamArray,m_strTitle) = 0 then prepare = false exit function end if m_strADOQuery = query_apply_actual_param(strSQLQuery,pDefaultParamArray) set_raport_param pDefaultParamArray prepare = true end function '-------------------- NXM begin -------------------- public function prepare4nxm(byval strTitle, byref oDefaultParamArray, byref oActualParamArray, byval strHostQueryCode) merge_params oDefaultParamArray, oActualParamArray m_strTitle = strTitle if show_raport_param_dialog(oDefaultParamArray, m_strTitle) = 0 then prepare4nxm = false exit function end if query_apply_actual_param "", oDefaultParamArray set_raport_param oDefaultParamArray Dim oTrans : Set oTrans = trans_.get_this() dim oNXMRS: set oNXMRS = doc_.nxm_net_.execute_host_query_rpa(strHostQueryCode, oTrans, oDefaultParamArray) supply_recordset oNXMRS prepare4nxm = true end function '-------------------- NXM end -------------------- public function add_group_section(byval WDFieldInx,byref pBeginProc,byref pEndProc) dim pNewSection : set pNewSection = new CRaportExecutorSection pNewSection.init WDFieldInx,pBeginProc,pEndProc,nothing addsection pNewSection set add_group_section = pNewSection end function public function add_body_ex(byref pBeginProc,byref pEndProc,byref pRowProc) dim pNewSection : set pNewSection = new CRaportExecutorSection pNewSection.init -1,pBeginProc,pEndProc,pRowProc addsection pNewSection set add_body_ex = pNewSection set m_pBodySection = pNewSection end function public function add_body(byref pRowProc) set add_body = add_body_ex(nothing,nothing,pRowProc) end function '-------------------- NX Part -------------------------------------- public function nx_prepare(byref oNXAspator,byval strTitle,byref oNXParamArray,byval strSQLQuery) 'nx_merge_params oNXParamArray, get_raport_param() 'todo 'set_raport_param oNXParamArray end function '-------------------- NX Part -------------------------------------- ' Do ręcznego przerabiana query tuż przez otwarciem ' Używane przy zmianie daty na nr_op_mag bez pisania ' specjalnej klasy CRapParam do tego public sub ReplaceQueryParam(byval oldvalue, byval newvalue) dim result_str : result_str = Replace(m_strADOQuery,oldvalue,newvalue) put_final_query result_str end sub public function perform() dim oPerf: set oPerf = doc_.performing(m_strTitle + " - trwa generowanie raportu ") 'open cursor if open() then begin_raport_data dim nGroupInterval: nGroupInterval = clng(100) dim nGroupInterval2: nGroupInterval2 = clng(2000) dim strMsg do while not isend() m_nRecNr = m_nRecNr + 1 'sprawdzanie warunków przerwania if m_nRecNr = nGroupInterval then strMsg = "Raport zawiera już " + cstr(m_nRecNr) if m_nRecCount>0 then strMsg = strMsg + " z " + cstr(m_nRecCount) end if strMsg = strMsg + " pozycji. Czy kontynuować generowanie?" ' ukryj na chwilę splasha set oPerf = nothing if MessageBoxAndForget(strMsg, "Generowanie raportu", vbYesNo, vbQuestion , USERPROF_REPORT_MOREDATA)<>vbYes then exit do else ' wyświetl ponownie splasha set oPerf = doc_.performing(m_strTitle + " - trwa generowanie raportu ") end if else if m_nRecNr = nGroupInterval2 then strMsg = "Raport zawiera już " + cstr(m_nRecNr) if m_nRecCount>0 then strMsg = strMsg + " z " + cstr(m_nRecCount) end if strMsg = strMsg + " pozycji. Czy kontynuować generowanie?" ' ukryj na chwilę splasha set oPerf = nothing if MessageBoxAndForget(strMsg, "Generowanie raportu", vbYesNo, vbQuestion , USERPROF_REPORT_MOREDATA_LEVEL2)<>vbYes then exit do else ' wyświetl ponownie splasha set oPerf = doc_.performing(m_strTitle + " - trwa generowanie raportu ") end if end if end if process_row next_row loop finish_raport_data perform = true else perform = false end if end function public sub supply_recordset(byref pRecordset) set m_pCurrRec = pRecordset end sub public property get RecNr RecNr = m_nRecNr end property public property get body set body = m_pBodySection end property #ifdef _DEBUG public function get_final_query() get_final_query = m_strADOQuery end function #endif public sub put_final_query(strADOQuery) m_strADOQuery = strADOQuery end sub public property get title title = m_strTitle end property public property let title(strTitle) m_strTitle = strTitle end property end class function merge_params(byref pDefaultParamArray,byref pCallParamArray) if pDefaultParamArray is nothing then exit function end if if pCallParamArray is nothing then exit function end if dim iter for iter = 0 to pDefaultParamArray.upperIndex if iter > pCallParamArray.upperIndex then exit function end if if not pCallParamArray.value(iter) is nothing then set pDefaultParamArray.value(iter) = pCallParamArray.value(iter) end if next end function 'zastąp parametry formalne w query parametrami aktualnymi uzyskanymi z dialogu function query_apply_actual_param(byval strQueryTemplate,byref pParamArray) dim pFormatter : set pFormatter = trans_.afc.convert.Formatter(strQueryTemplate) if not pParamArray is nothing then dim strCondition dim iter for iter = 0 to pParamArray.upperIndex pFormatter.add pParamArray.value(iter).get_where_part(trans_) next end if query_apply_actual_param = pFormatter.ToString() end function '--------------- API ----------------------------- function show_raport_param_dialog(byref pRaportParams, byval strTitle) if pRaportParams is nothing then show_raport_param_dialog = 1 else dim iter dim bAllComplete : bAllComplete = true for iter = 0 to pRaportParams.upperIndex bAllComplete = bAllComplete and pRaportParams.value(iter).is_complete() next if bAllComplete then show_raport_param_dialog = 1 else 'wygeneruj okno dialogu na podstawie parametrów dim pDialogBuilder : set pDialogBuilder = doc_.afc.rap.new_param_dlg(pRaportParams , trans_ , strTitle) dim pSO : set pSO = doc_.createstreamobj dim strXML : strXML = pDialogBuilder.get_all() #ifdef APPCONFIG_SHOW_EXCEL_FRIENDLY_RAPORTS strXML = replace(strXML,"function generate","function g2xls:trans_.var(8027)=clng(1):generate:end function:function generate") strXML = replace(strXML,">Generuj",">Generuj ") #endif pSO.write strXML #ifdef _DEBUG pSO.save "c:\temp\raport_param_dialog.xml" pSO.rewind #endif 'wyświetl stronę dim hli : set hli = doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE") set hli.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE) = pSO.getstream set pSO = nothing dim pDialogPage : set pDialogPage = doc_.getpagehli(hli) 'reset trans_.var(GVAR_RAPORT_GEN_MODE)=clng(0) dim nResult : nResult= pDialogPage.domodalauto() if nResult <> 0 then pDialogBuilder.update_params(pDialogPage) end if show_raport_param_dialog = nResult end if end if end function function new_engine() set new_engine = new CRaportExecutorEngine end function function set_raport_param(byref pRaportParam) 'parametry raportu (te co są w dialogu) set g_pRaportParam = pRaportParam end function function get_raport_param set get_raport_param = g_pRaportParam end function '--------------- helpers ------------------------- function href_open_form_proxy(byval nTypeId,byval idObj) href_open_form_proxy=href_open_form_proxy_extra(nTypeId,idObj,"") end function function href_open_form_proxy_extra(byval nTypeId,byval idObj,byval strExtra) href_open_form_proxy_extra="varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_OPEN_FORM_PROXY varNewThread=1 varTypeId=" +_ cstr(nTypeId) + " varObject=" + cstr(idObj) + " " + cstr(strExtra) end function dim pPicModule : set pPicModule = doc_.getmodule(60301) function process_number(byval strNumber) if trans_.var(GVAR_RAPORT_GEN_MODE)=clng(1) then process_number = replace(strNumber," ","") else process_number = strNumber end if end function function raport_picture(byval nTypeId,byval idObj) raport_picture = cstr(pPicModule.get_obj_pic_id(nTypeId,idObj, PICUSE_LISTELEM)) end function function enum_field_value(byval nTypeId,byval strFldName,byval eVal) Dim pObjDef : Set pObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(nTypeId) enum_field_value = pObjDef.field(pObjDef.GetFieldIndex(strFldName)).enumvalue(eVal-1) end function function write_actual_param(byref so,byref pActualParam) dim iter dim bAnyWritten : bAnyWritten = false if not pActualParam is nothing then for iter = 0 to pActualParam.upperIndex if pActualParam.value(iter).get_desc() <> "" then bAnyWritten = true so.write "
" end if next end if if not bAnyWritten then so.write "brak
" end if so.write "
" end function
